breakdown: This roadmap artifact validator demonstrates solid structure with well-named classes and methods, good error collection patterns via ValidationResult, and clear docstrings explaining purpose. Type safety is decent with dataclasses and Optional types, though internal dict structures lack TypedDict definitions. Architecture is clean with single-responsibility validation methods. Test coverage is absent as this appears to be documentation-only infrastructure code.
reasoning: Strong naming and documentation offset by zero test coverage; the codebase uses appropriate type hints and dataclasses but could benefit from TypedDict for parsed section data. Error handling via collected errors/warnings lists is a good pattern. The code is readable and maintainable despite the incomplete state (missing closing for _validate_prerequisites method).
